since_last: 73% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.59%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.04% · BTC -2.87% · Gold -2.48% · Nasdaq100 +2.41%. 73% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.59%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.59%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +12.30%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +12.30%, SMR +11.22%, SMCI +10.75%, INTC +10.31%, CRNC +10.30%. Laggards: INOD -7.49%, SPCX -6.64%, IBM -3.98%, WDAY -2.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.64% at $179.08
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.64% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
